title: More Grindstone Variants
description: Grindstones for every kind of wood and some stone types (Sandstone, Basalt, Deepslate and Granite)
body:
[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/a-los-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/requires-quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Grindstone-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) ## More Grindstone Variants Not only every wood type but also four new stone variants all get their own grindstone. Next to the regular stone variant, you can also use _Sandstone Slabs_, _Deepslate Slabs_, _Granite Slabs_ and _Basalt_ blocks. ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Grindstone-Variants/pres/mr_desc_banner.png) ### Adding 59 new _Grindstones_ to Minecraft! ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Grindstone-Variants/pres/mr_desc_crafting_ingredient_table_anim.gif)
How can I craft vanilla Grindstones using modded wood types from Biomes o' Plenty, [Let's Do] mods, and others? Unfortunately, the vanilla Grindstone crafting recipe has to be overridden for the crafting of the variants to function.

But usually these mods add their wood types to the Vanilla recipe, which creates a conflict. Fortunately, there is also a fairly easy way around this issue.

That is what the "More Compatibility Variants" are for:
These datapacks/mods resolve this issue across all of our "More X Variants" mods, so you can craft grindstones and other vanilla items/blocks just as you would expect.
 
Currently available **_More Compatibility Variants_**:
 - [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-bop)
 - [[Let's Do] Meadow, (Nether)Vinery, Beachparty and Blooming Nature](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-lets-do)
 - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-ns)
 - [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-otbwg)
Would you like to see support for another mod with custom wood types? Let me know via [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sA42pp6cuX), [GitHub](https://github.com/pnk2u), or [E-Mail](mailto:pnku@pnku.de)!
--- ## Compatible with [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) 1.3.0+'s block replacement: ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/fu4b0.webp) Looking out from a window of a Weaponsmith onto the entrance of a Fisher's house: We can see that instead of a _Dark Oak (Stone) Grindstone_, _Oak Torches_ and a regular _Chest_ in the house and _Spruce Barrels_ in the background, the game now generates the village with a _**Jungle Sandstone Grindstone**_, _**Jungle Torches**_ (from [More Torch Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants)), a _**Jungle Chest**_ (from [More Chest Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion)) and _**Jungle Barrels**_ (from [More Barrel Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-barrel-variants)). ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/nhw3r.gif)**]()
